license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q62dzge
title: Quantification of circulating microRNA using TaqMan Low Density Array (TLDA)
author: Helle Glud Binderup

steps_raw.instruction: Dual centrifugation use 10 ml of EDTA anticoagulated whole blood centrifugation at 3000 g for 15 minutes (acceleration 5, brake 6, temperature 18 °C) transfer plasma phase to new tube, leaving approximately 1 mL of plasma on top of the buffy coat centrifugation at 3000 g for 15 minutes (acceleration 5, brake 6, temperature 18 °C) transfer plasma phase to cryo tubes, leaving approximately 1 ml of plasma in the bottom of the tube store at -80 °C (Hettich centrifuge, 4706-01, Rotina 420R) Alternatively, a prolonged single centrifugation may be used 1. use 5 ml of EDTA anticoagulated whole blood 2. centrifuge at 3000 g for 30 minutes (acceleration 5, brake 6, temperature 18 °C) 3. transfer plasma phase to cryo-tubes, leaving approximately 0.5 ml of plasma on top of the buffy coat
Nucleospin®miRNA Plasma Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740971.50

Follow the instructions given by the manufacture (se notes before you start): a STEP 1: use 300 µL platelet-poor plasma STEP 4: after addition of isopropanol, add also 5 µL spike-in (cel-miR-39, 2.75 × 10 −12 M) STEP 6: perform the optional DNA digest

TaqMan®MicroRNA Reverse Transcription Kit Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4366597 Custom TaqMan®Array MicroRNA Cards Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4449135

Prepare RT master mix: %s %s *add 10-20% excess volume Mix gently and place on ice Remember to include a RT-negative sample (no template) It is also a good idea to include a RT-positive sample (a microRNA-sample included in all runs)
For each RT reaction, combine 7 µL RT master mix with 3 µL of purified microRNA in a 0.2 µL polypropylene reaction tube Keep on ice
Mix gently and incubate on ice for 5 minutes
Transfer the reaction tubes to a termocycler Incubate in 40 cycles of 16 °C for 2 min, at 42 °C for 1 min and 50 °C for 1 sec. Finish with 85 °C for 5 min and cool to 4 ºC.
Continue immediately to the PCR amplification or store the RT-reaction in -20 °C.
Custom TaqMan®Array MicroRNA Cards Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4449135 TaqMan™ PreAmp Master Mix Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4391128
Prepare preamplification reaction mix: %s %s *add 10-20% excess volume Mix gently
Combine 20 µL of qPCR reaction mix with 5 µL of RT-reaction (cDNA) in a 96 well plate Seal plate

Incubate in 95 °C for 10 min, 55 °C for 2 min and 72 °C for 2 min Proceed with 14 cycles of 95 °C for 15 sec and 60 °C for 4 min. Finish with 99.9 °C for 10 min and cool to 4 °C Continue immediately or store at 4 °C for up to 12 hours or at -20 °C for up to 1 week.

Use a specific TaqMan assay for the spike-in (Cel-miR-39, assay 000200) and one of the target miRNAs included in the Array to test the preamplification product before loading it on the array. 20X TaqMan MicroRNA Assay Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4440887 2X TaqMan Universal PCR Master Mix Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4318157
Prepare qPCR reaction mix (run each sample in doublets): %s %s *add 10-20% excess volume Mix gently
Combine 19 µL of qPCR reaction mix with 1.3 µL of RT-reaction (cDNA) in a 96 well plate Seal plate
Transfer plate to ABI Prism 7900HT Use the SDS software to set up the run Incubate in 50 °C for 2 min and 95 °C for 10 min Proceed with 40 cycles of 95 °C for 15 sec and 60 °C for 60 sec.
Evaluate the Ct-values obtained
Custom TaqMan®Array MicroRNA Cards Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4449135
Prepare samples: %s %s
Load 100 µL sample-dilution to each port on the array Centrifuge The array at 1200 rpm for 2 min Seal the array
Sequence Detection System (SDS) 2.4 https://www.thermofisher.com/search/results?query=sequence+analysis+software&persona=Catalog&navId=10949&refinementAction=true&focusarea=Search+All
Normalization is performed using the ΔCt-method (2 -ΔCt ) ΔCt = mean Ct target miRNA - mean Ct cel-miR-39 (mean of triplets)
Transfer array to ABI Prism 7900HT Use the SDS software to set up the run Incubate in 50 °C for 2 min and 94.5 °C for 10 min Proceed with 40 cycles of 97 °C for 30 sec and 59.7 °C for 60 sec.
Sequence Detection System (SDS) 2.4 https://www.thermofisher.com/search/results?query=sequence+analysis+software&persona=Catalog&navId=10949&refinementAction=true&focusarea=Search+All
